title: Rib (Roanoke Library)
description: A collection of common code and tooling for Roanoke Development's mods
body:
## Rib is Roanoke Development LTD's Mod Library - required by most of our server-side mods

You can find out more about Roanoke Development on [our website](https://roanoke.dev/), or head over to [our Discord](https://discord.gg/y3YjcDsmDQ).
